prerequisites.label: Agnes AI API Key (existing fleet credential)
prerequisites.satisfy: AGNES_AI_API_KEY is the EXISTING fleet credential the agnes / agnes-2.0-flash model already uses against apihub.agnes-ai.com/v1. Confirm it is SET (never print the value). If absent, ask the operator to add AGNES_AI_API_KEY to ~/.openclaw/secrets/.env (chmod 600), then: openclaw config set env.vars.AGNES_AI_API_KEY "$AGNES_AI_API_KEY". Do NOT mint a new key.
